Package foundry.veil.impl.client.imgui

Class VeilImGuiImplGlfw

java.lang.Object
foundry.veil.impl.client.imgui.VeilImGuiImplGlfw
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, org.lwjgl.system.NativeResource
@Internal public class VeilImGuiImplGlfw extends Object implements org.lwjgl.system.NativeResource

  • Constructor Details

    • VeilImGuiImplGlfw

      public VeilImGuiImplGlfw(VeilImGuiImpl impl)

  • Method Details

    • mouseButtonCallback

      public void mouseButtonCallback(long windowId, int button, int action, int mods)
      Method to set the GLFWMouseButtonCallback.
      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      button - clicked mouse button
      action - click action type
      mods - click modifiers

    • scrollCallback

      public void scrollCallback(long windowId, double xOffset, double yOffset)
      Method to set the GLFWScrollCallback.
      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      xOffset - scroll offset by x-axis
      yOffset - scroll offset by y-axis

    • keyCallback

      public void keyCallback(long windowId, int key, int scancode, int action, int mods)
      Method to set the GLFWKeyCallback.
      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      key - pressed key
      scancode - key scancode
      action - press action
      mods - press modifiers

    • windowFocusCallback

      public void windowFocusCallback(long windowId, boolean focused)
      Method to set the GLFWWindowFocusCallback.
      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      focused - is window focused

    • cursorEnterCallback

      public void cursorEnterCallback(long windowId, boolean entered)
      Method to set the GLFWCursorEnterCallback.
      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      entered - is cursor entered

    • charCallback

      public void charCallback(long windowId, int c)
      Method to set the GLFWCharCallback.
      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      c - pressed char

    • monitorCallback

      public void monitorCallback(long windowId, int event)
      Method to set the GLFWMonitorCallback.
      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      event - monitor event type (ignored)

    • init

      public boolean init(long windowId, boolean installCallbacks)
      Method to do an initialization of the ImGuiImplGlfw state. It SHOULD be called before calling the ImGuiImplGlfw.newFrame() method.

      Method takes two arguments, which should be a valid GLFW window pointer and a boolean indicating whether or not to install callbacks.

      Parameters:
      windowId - pointer to the window
      installCallbacks - should window callbacks be installed
      Returns:
      true if everything initialized

    • newFrame

      public void newFrame()
      Updates ImGuiIO and GLFW state.

    • free

      public void free()
      Method to restore GLFW to it's state prior to calling method ImGuiImplGlfw.init(long, boolean).
      Specified by:
      free in interface org.lwjgl.system.NativeResource
